reasoning: John Morgan explicitly stated in mid-May 2025 that he intends to wait until September 2026 (after the major party primaries) to decide on and announce a run for Florida governor. While he faces an impending June 2025 statutory deadline to register a new political party and/or switch his affiliation to comply with Florida's 365-day rule before the June 2026 qualifying period, doing so does not require him to formally announce a gubernatorial campaign. Morgan is a self-funded billionaire who explicitly noted he does not need to open a campaign account early. Given his strong, repeated insistence on waiting to see the political landscape develop before entering the race, the probability that he will formally announce his candidacy before July 1, 2025, is extremely low.
